description: Modify a single node by ID.

6.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 6.0 command indexes.

7.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 7.0 contents command index.

keywords.name: merge
keywords.description: Merge the node with node i2 (node ID positive integer).

keywords.name: move-to
keywords.description: Moves the node to location v , 3D coordinate vector ( \(u,v,w\) ). If supplied, merge-tolerance f will be used as a tolerance for merging nodes during moving.
